---
name: Feature request
about: An idea to make the studio better — much wow
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
Describe the workflow that's awkward or impossible today.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen. Mockups/sketches welcome.

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways you've tried to accomplish this.

**Scope check**
Shiba Studio is local-first and Grok/xAI-only by design (see
CONTRIBUTING.md). Features that add other hosted model providers or require a
hosted backend are out of scope.
